title: Astryx
body:
# Astryx
A handcrafted Fabric modpack for Minecraft 1.21.11 built around one idea: make exploration feel worth it again.

Astryx blends massive world generation, lived-in adventure content, serious performance tuning, and deep immersion under a clean visual layer powered by Complementary Unbound shaders. No bloat, no kitchen-sink — every mod earns its slot.

## ✨ What makes Astryx different

A world worth exploring. Terralith, Tectonic, and Towns & Towers turn the overworld into something you actually want to walk across — not just strip-mine.

Smarter loot, fairer multiplayer. Lootr gives every player their own loot rolls in chests. No more racing your friends to the dungeon.

You die, you keep going. Gravestones save your inventory where you fall, so a bad fight isn't a save-wipe.

Performance first. Lithium, C2ME, FerriteCore, ImmediatelyFast, Entity Culling, Ksyxis, BadOptimizations, Krypton, More Culling, and ThreadTweak carry the framerate even on long sessions and bigger servers.

Looks and sounds the part. Ships pre-configured with Complementary Unbound + Euphoria Patcher for a cinematic feel from day one — with dynamic lighting, falling leaves, realistic sound physics, and immersive footsteps on top.

## 🗺️ World Generation & Exploration

- Terralith — reimagined biomes and terrain
- Tectonic — dramatic mountains, valleys, and cliffs
- Towns & Towers — generated villages, ruins, and pillager outposts that feel real
- Better Archeology — excavation that actually rewards you
- Universal Ores — ores fit every stone type
- Voxy — smooth far-distance LOD rendering
- Glowing Torchflower — small touch, big atmosphere

## ⚔️ Adventure & Content

- Artifacts + Nameless Trinkets — wearable trinkets with unique effects (via Trinkets API)
- Advanced Netherite — endgame progression past netherite
- More Mobs + Cosy Critters + Animal Garden — extra wildlife across biomes
- More Armor Trims + Visual Armor Trims + Cosmetic Armor — extensive appearance customization
- Elytra Trinket — wear your elytra in the trinket slot, keep your chestplate
- Master Cutter — refined crafting variety
- Farmer's Delight (Refabricated) + More Delight + Rustic Delight — cooking, food, and farming you'll actually use
- Traveler's Backpack — proper carrying capacity for long expeditions
- Open Parties and Claims — claim chunks and share land with your party

## 🎒 Quality of Life

- REI — recipe lookup
- Jade + Jade Modded Entities — block/entity tooltips including modded mobs
- Xaero's Minimap + World Map — best-in-class navigation
- Inventory Management, Mouse Tweaks, Trash Slot — inventory feels modern
- InvMove — move while your inventory or chests are open
- Shulker Box Tooltip — see shulker contents without placing them down
- Trade Cycling, Infinite Trading, Fast Trading — villager trading without the pain
- Grind Enchantments + Enchantment Descriptions — know what you're enchanting, undo what you don't want
- Vein Miner — mine entire ore veins with a single swing
- Loot Restock — chests refill over time
- Not Enough Animations — better player animations
- Advancement Plaques — stylish animated advancement notifications
- Chat Heads — player avatars next to chat messages
- Freecam — detach your camera to scout ahead
- Scribble — improved book editor
- Resourcify — in-game resource pack browser

## 🔊 Immersion & Audio

- Sound Physics Remastered — realistic reverb, echo, and sound muffling through walls
- Presence Footsteps — immersive footstep sounds per surface
- Simple Voice Chat — built-in proximity voice chat

## ⚡ Performance & Tech

- Lithium · C2ME · FerriteCore · ImmediatelyFast · Entity Culling · Ksyxis · BadOptimizations · Krypton · More Culling · ThreadTweak · Clumps · Fast IP Ping · Prickle · Spark

## 🎨 Visuals

- Complementary Unbound r5.8.1 + Euphoria Patcher (preinstalled)
- LambDynamicLights — dynamic handheld lighting
- Entity Model & Texture Features — custom mob models and random textures
- Falling Leaves — leaves drift from trees
- Enchantment Outlines
- Fast Better Grass
- Low Fire / Low Shield — cleaner combat view

## 📦 Requirements

- Minecraft: 1.21.11
- Loader: Fabric 0.19.2+
- RAM: 6 GB recommended (8 GB with shaders)
- Java: 21+

### As always, dont forget to join our [Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/R7UDJaZEBc)!
